class.name: emergency_mppi/EmergencyMPPIController
class.description: Modified MPPI Controller with Emergency Stop logic and critic switching. Ensures 0 velocity command if all trajectories are in collision.

class.name: emergency_mppi::critics::CostCritic
class.description: mppi critic for obstacle avoidance using costmap score

class.name: emergency_mppi::critics::GoalCritic
class.description: mppi critic for driving towards the goal

class.name: emergency_mppi::critics::GoalAngleCritic
class.description: mppi critic for achieving the goal heading angle

class.name: emergency_mppi::critics::PathAlignCritic
class.description: mppi critic for aligning to path

class.name: emergency_mppi::critics::PathAngleCritic
class.description: mppi critic for tracking the path in the correct heading

class.name: emergency_mppi::critics::PathFollowCritic
class.description: mppi critic for driving towards the goal that is furthest among trajectories nearest path points

class.name: emergency_mppi::critics::PreferForwardCritic
class.description: mppi critic for preferring forward motion

class.name: emergency_mppi::critics::TwirlingCritic
class.description: mppi critic for preventing twirling behavior when using omnidirectional models

class.name: emergency_mppi::critics::VelocityDeadbandCritic
class.description: mppi critic for restricting command velocities in deadband range
